PathOfBuilding2.Notes:
You can find my detailed build guide here: https://maxroll.gg/poe2/build-guides/bombarding-minions-infernalist-build-guide
You can find my leveling guide here: https://maxroll.gg/poe2/build-guides/minion-army-infernalist-leveling-guide
Maxroll Planner: https://maxroll.gg/poe2/planner/i9hfb03m
^7^0Made by Helm Breaker
